title: test/serve: fix a descriptor leak, add preliminary directory support
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Fix a descriptor leak in the test helper, and add some minimal support for clients that might want to ~script~ scrape HTML of a directory to walk the filesystem.

#### How to verify it

Tests should continue to pass.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
